sections.paragraph:
Original: מות

Transliteration: mâveth

Phonetic: maw'-veth

BDB Definition:

  1. death, dying, Death (personified), realm of the dead
    1. death
    2. death by violence (as a penalty)
    3. state of death, place of death

Origin: from H4191

TWOT entry: 1169a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
